attributes.action: Stop people buying baby milk for reborn dolls
attributes.additional_details: Ban people from buying baby milk for reborn dolls
attributes.background: Stop it there is no baby milk on shelves for our children because people are buying it for reborn dolls

rejection.details:
We can only accept petitions about things the Government or Parliament are directly responsible for.

Decisions about the use of baby formula are a matter for private individuals, not the UK Government or Parliament.
